name: Pudding Easter Eggs
recipeIngredient: 2 packs regular pudding (not instant), any flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine melted butter and milk in a bowl.
2. Add the regular pudding mix to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Gradually add 1 pound of powdered sugar, stirring constantly until smooth.
4. (Optional) Stir in 1 cup of peanut butter, coconut, nuts, or candied fruit if desired.
5. Shape the mixture into egg-shaped forms using a piping bag or spoon.
6. Chill the shaped pudding eggs until firm.
7. Coat the chilled pudding eggs with chocolate.
8. Decorate or roll the cooled chocolate-covered eggs in crushed nuts, coconut, or sprinkles.
9. Store the finished Easter eggs in airtight containers.
